exceptions.reason: No code moves focus into the coachmark when it opens -- no autoFocus, no ref, no querySelector. Focus stays wherever it already was.
No stored reference to what had focus before open, so nothing restores it when the coachmark advances past its last step or is skipped.
Nothing constrains Tab -- a keyboard user can tab straight out of the coachmark into the page behind the scrim while it is still open.
No keydown listener anywhere. The scrim has onClick={onSkip}, so a mouse click outside dismisses it, but there is no keyboard equivalent.
